title: Add List with Adjustment Strategy content schema
description: Content schema for the Add List with Adjustment Strategy — The Compensation Workout game. Derived from fallbackContent in index.html. Every game_init payload's content field must validate against this schema.

previewInstruction.description: HTML instruction string shown on the PART-039 PreviewScreen.

previewAudioText.description: TTS source text for the preview audio. The deployment pipeline converts this to mp3 and patches previewAudio.

previewAudio.description: CDN URL of the prerendered preview mp3. Null at build time, populated by deploy step 2.5.

showGameOnPreview.description: Whether to render the live play area behind the preview overlay.

totalRounds.description: Number of rounds played per session (9).

totalLives.description: Number of lives at game start (3).

rounds.description: Round objects across one or more sets. Length is totalRounds (9) × number-of-sets (3) = 27 in fallback. Round-set cycling MANDATORY (validator GEN-ROUNDSETS-MIN-3).

set.description: Round-set identifier. Set A first attempt; B/C cycle on retry.

id.description: Globally unique question identifier across all sets (e.g. A_r1_58_72). Stable across sessions for gauge analytics.

type.description: Round type. This game only uses Type A (adjust-and-add).

addend1Start.description: Starting value of addend 1 shown in box 1 when the round loads.

addend2Start.description: Starting value of addend 2 shown in box 2 when the round loads.

addend1Friendly.description: Friendly target for addend 1 (typically a multiple of 10) used in the correct-answer reveal animation. Compensation invariant: addend1Friendly + addend2Friendly === correct.

addend2Friendly.description: Friendly target for addend 2 used in the correct-answer reveal animation. Compensation invariant: addend1Friendly + addend2Friendly === correct.

correct.description: Correct integer the student must type. EQUALS addend1Start + addend2Start AND addend1Friendly + addend2Friendly.

successAudio.description: Dynamic TTS string played on correct submit, parameterised on this round's specific numbers.

failAudio.description: Dynamic TTS string played on wrong submit, parameterised on this round's specific numbers.

misconception_tags.description: Map from stringified candidate wrong answer to misconception tag. Includes a 'whole-rule-mismatch' fallback key.

answer.description: Answer payload consumed by PART-051 AnswerComponent for the post-victory carousel.

strategyStatement.description: Plain-language compensation explanation shown on the answer carousel slide.
